zh-CN.name: 洋葱
zh-CN.intro: 洋葱是一种紫色的蔬菜，圆圆的，一层一层的。切的时候会让人流眼泪，但煮熟后甜甜的，可以做很多好吃的菜。

story.title: 🧅洋葱的秘密
story.body: 小厨师今天要做汤，他从篮子里拿出一个圆圆的洋葱。小厨师一层一层剥开，咦，怎么里面还有一层？剥啊剥，他的眼睛开始流泪了。妈妈说：“洋葱有辣眼睛的气味，但煮熟了就变甜啦。”小厨师把洋葱切成小块放进锅里，咕嘟咕嘟煮了好久。汤做好了，他尝了一口，真的好甜呀！小兔子闻到香味跑过来，小厨师给它盛了一碗。小兔子喝得暖乎乎的，开心地说：“洋葱真神奇！”从那以后，小厨师再也不怕剥洋葱了。

knowledge.title: 吃洋葱有什么好处？
knowledge.body: 洋葱里有很多对身体好的东西，能帮助我们抵抗细菌，让心脏更健康。虽然生吃有点辣，但炒熟或煮汤后甜甜的，又好吃又健康！

en.name: Onion
en.intro: An onion is a purple vegetable that is round and has many layers. Cutting it can make you cry, but when cooked, it becomes sweet and delicious in many dishes.

story.title: 🧅The Onion's Secret
story.body: Today, the little chef wanted to make soup. He took a round onion from the basket. He peeled one layer, then another—wait, there was still another layer inside! As he peeled, his eyes started to water. Mom said, “Onions have a smell that stings your eyes, but they turn sweet when cooked.” The little chef chopped the onion into small pieces and put them in the pot. It bubbled for a long time. When the soup was ready, he took a sip—so sweet! The little rabbit smelled the yummy aroma and came over. The chef gave him a bowl. The rabbit sipped and felt so warm. “Onions are magical!” he said. From then on, the little chef never feared peeling onions again.

knowledge.title: Why is eating onions good for you?
knowledge.body: Onions have special things that help your body fight germs and keep your heart healthy. They might be a little spicy raw, but cooked in soup or stir-fry, they become sweet and yummy!
